title: Clever LMS Connect - API Reference
heading: Assignments
content:
## Assignments

The Assignment Object Schema  

Property

Type

Description & Notes

Guaranteed

`id`

String (UUID)

UUID for assignment. Used in API calls.

Y

`created`

Date

Resource creation date. ISO 8601 format in UTC time.

Y

`last_modified`

Date

Last time resource was updated. ISO 8601 format in UTC time.

Y

`title`

String

The assignment's title.

Y

`description`

String

The assignment description.

Y

`state`

String

The assignment state. Possible values: \["draft", "scheduled", "open", "locked"\]

Y

`attachments`

List of attachments

List of attachments associated with the assignment.

N

`assignee_mode`

String

Indicates whether all or individual students in a section are associated with an assignment. Possible values: \["all", "individuals"\]

N

`assignee_ids`

List of ObjectIDs

List of IDs of users associated with the assignment. Used when the assignee\_mode is "individuals".

N

`due_date`

Date

Indicates when new submissions are late for the assignment. **Due dates can only be set in the future.**  
  
_Note: null is possible if teacher manually creates assignment._

Y\*

`display_date`

Date

Indicates when the assignment becomes visible to students.

N

`start_date`

Date

Indicates when submissions begin to be accepted for the assignment.

N

`end_date`

Date

Indicates when submissions are no longer accepted for the assignment.

N

`points_possible`

Number

The number of points possible for the assignment.

N

`grading_type`

String

The assignment's grading type. Possible value: \["points"\]

Y

`submission_types`

List of submission types

List of submission types accepted by the assignment. If not specified, providers may not accept submissions. Possible values: \["link", "text"\]

N

`max_attempts`

Number

The maximum number of attempts a submission for an assignment can have.

N

`term_id`

ObjectID

Globally unique and stable Clever-generated id for term associated with the assignment.

N

  
POST /sections/<section\_id>/assignments (Create Assignment)  
Creates a new assignment in the specified section. Sample Request Body  

```json
{
  "title": "Example title",
  "due_date": "2028-02-29T23:48:24.000Z",
  "attachments": [
    {
      "url": "[https://clever.com](https://clever.com)",
      "type": "link",
      "title": "Link title here",
      "description": "Link description here"
    }
  ],
  "description": "Example description",
  "assignee_mode": "all",
  "points_possible": 100,
  "submission_types": [
    "link"
  ]
}
```

  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "assignee_mode": "all",
    "attachments": [
      {
        "title": "Clever | Connect every student to a world of learning",
        "type": "link",
        "url": "[https://clever.com](https://clever.com)"
      }
    ],
    "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:06.713Z",
    "description": "Example description",
    "due_date": "2028-02-29T23:48:00.000Z",
    "grading_type": "points",
    "id": "c8f5eced-1ae1-45d9-97ce-0d4f6c0157d5",
    "last_modified": "2024-11-06T23:28:05.743Z",
    "max_attempts": 1,
    "points_possible": 100,
    "state": "open",
    "submission_types": [
      "link"
    ]
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`title`

Body

String

**Required.**

`description`

Body

String

**Required.**

`attachments`

Body

List

`due_date`

Body

Date

`assignee_mode`

Body

String

Allowed values: \["all", "individuals"\]. "all" is recommended for most use cases.

`assignee_ids`

Body

Array of ObjectIDs

Only required if assignee\_mode is "individuals".

`points_possible`

Body

Number

`submission_types`

Body

Array of Strings

Allowed values: \["link", "text"\]

`max_attempts`

Body

Number

`term_id`

Body

String (ObjectID)

  
Unsupported fields  

LMS

Unsupported Fields

**Canvas**

`start_date` (Use `display_date` instead), `term_id`.

**Schoology**

`start_date` (Will return a `FIELD_IGNORED` error).

  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Canvas**

`state` ignored

Ignored if provided in the request body. The default state upon creation is `open`.

**Canvas**

Missing `submission_types`

If left blank, the Canvas UI may show "nothing" or appear blank when submitting.

**Canvas**

Missing `max_attempts`

Defaults to `-1`. Ensure it is set to a positive integer.

**Google Classroom**

`due_date` not required

A teacher may remove it.

**Schoology**

`term_id` required

The Clever-generated term ID is **required**.

**Schoology**

Attachment types

Only `text` attachment types are supported for writes (`link` is only supported for reads). For Schoology writes, `type: "text"` attachments must include a `text` field. Do not send `url` for `text` attachments. Example attachment: `{"type":"text","text":"https://clever.com/attachment","title":"Test - 1"}`.

  
GET /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id> (Get Assignment)  
Returns a specific assignment for a section. Sample Request Body  
_(No Request Body for GET requests)_  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "assignee_mode": "all",
    "attachments": [
      {
        "title": "Clever | Connect every student to a world of learning",
        "type": "link",
        "url": "[https://clever.com](https://clever.com)"
      }
    ],
    "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:06.713Z",
    "description": "Example description",
    "due_date": "2028-02-29T23:48:00.000Z",
    "grading_type": "points",
    "id": "c8f5eced-1ae1-45d9-97ce-0d4f6c0157d5",
    "last_modified": "2024-11-06T23:28:05.743Z",
    "max_attempts": 1,
    "points_possible": 100,
    "state": "open",
    "submission_types": [
      "link"
    ]
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

  
Unsupported fields  
_(None)_  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Canvas**

Automatic `state` updates
